Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 2 0 0}Would you mind trying some of it?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 3 0 0}I think this one should taste better.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 4 0 0}{f 4 23 0 6 3 25 25}...Or at the very least, it can't be any worse than last time, right?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Judging by appearances, it[n]does look like she's improved.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I'll give it a try...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 7 0 0}Aw, he's so cute. I did hear there were lots of strays around here.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 8 0 0}He's looking at the bento box. I wonder if he's hungry...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_7_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 9 0 0}Maybe I should give him some food. What do you think, {f 4 1}-kun?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 11 0 0}Oh, wait. Is there anything in here cats can't eat?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 12 0 0}Hmm... Well, if it's just flavored rice, it should be okay.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 13 0 0}Oh, right. There might be things in here cats can't eat.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 14 0 0}{f 4 23 0 6 1 25 25}But then again, if it's just flavored rice, I think it'll be okay.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_012_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 22 0 0}{f 4 23 0 6 0 25 25}It does have some bitterness, I guess.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 23 0 0}I thought I struck a good nutritional balance, though.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_013_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 24 0 0}But I know nutrition's not the issue here.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_014_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 25 0 0}Sorry, {f 4 1}-kun. I can't let you eat this.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 26 0 0}I don't want to put you in the hospital...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: SEL_015_0_0
Dialog.Option: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Maybe we can use it in battle.

Dialog.name: MSG_016_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 4 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 28 0 0}I'll figure out what to do with this later, b-but you can't eat it.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_017_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 29 0 0}You mean like, feed it to the Shadows?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_018_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 32 0 0}I just wanted to do something to help everyone outside of battle.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 33 0 0}There aren't many chances to eat homemade food when you live in the dorm.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 34 0 0}So I thought it would be nice to cook for everyone, but...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_018_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 35 0 0}I'm sorry. I'll keep trying to get better though.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_019_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I can tell Fuuka is being considerate of me.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}It seems we've grown closer...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_020_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 36 0 0}It's kind of hard for me to say this, considering what just happened, but...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 37 0 0}{f 4 23 0 6 0 25 25}I hope you'll be willing to taste test my cooking again.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 38 0 0}I don't think I can do this alone. Can I... count on you to help?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_022_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 40 0 0}I'm going to keep working at it. Then someday, you'll tell me you like my cooking.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_023_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 42 0 0}I'm going to try really hard! And hopefully I don't make you sick in the process.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_024_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 43 0 0}Oh, I didn't realize it was so late.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_024_1_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 44 0 0}I need to buy more ingredients, so I should get going. I'll see you later.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_025_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I said goodbye to Fuuka and[n]went back to the dorm...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: SYS_026_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}DEV: Unused label.[n]{f 1 1}
